message: Moving run_count += 1 before job_func() plus the added pre-execution guard correctly preserves exact-N-executions semantics: probe with max_runs(3) via direct job.run() calls showed calls 1-2 execute job_func and return non-cancel, call 3 executes job_func (3rd execution) and returns CancelJob, calls 4-6 return CancelJob without invoking job_func again (run_count stays pinned at 3, call count stays pinned at 3). No off-by-one in either direction.
quote:
results (call#, is_cancel, run_count, calls_len):
(1, False, 1, 1)
(2, False, 2, 2)
(3, True, 3, 3)
(4, True, 3, 3)
(5, True, 3, 3)
(6, True, 3, 3)
